item.title: Estrela Mountain Dog - A Loyal and Protective Companion
item.description: The Estrela Mountain Dog is a large and powerful breed that originated in Portugal. They were originally bred to guard livestock and property in the mountainous regions of Portugal, and their loyalty and protective nature make them excellent watchdogs and companions.
